blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the audit trail requirement.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the audit trail requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an audit trail of changes, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. While the linked use case mentions the need for an audit trail, there are no specific API reads or persisted state checks presented that demonstrate how changes are tracked, leading to an inconclusive result. Therefore, the requirement for an audit trail remains unverified due to the lack of concrete evidence.
